subcodes.first_line: O beloved handmaidens of God! Praise be unto Him that ye have quaffed a brimming cup in the path of guidance. May it bring you joy [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای کنیزان عزیزان حق الحمد لله در راه هدی جام لبریزی نوشیدید نوش جان باد این
subcodes.subjects: @role and station of women, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement
